stemHtml: Taking into consideration Northern Oceanic Transition Area (NOTA) and Shannon Oceanic Transition Area (SOTA) - which one is in NAT HLA and which one has the same instrument requirements as NAT HLA?

options.a: Neither NOTA and SOTA is in NAT HLA, hence no instruments requirement like in NAT.
options.b: Either NOTA and SOTA is in NAT HLA, hence instruments requirement like in NAT.
options.c: SOTA is in NAT HLA, however requirements only apply if continuing into NAT HLA.
options.d: NOTA is NAT HLA, hence instruments requirement like in NAT.
